_description: DyT alpha_init sweep: 64M GPT on WikiText-103 1M tokens (overfitting regime), 5K steps. Tests sensitivity to alpha initialization.

dyt_alpha_0.5._note: DyT paper default. Slowest convergence but best generalization in overfitting regime.

dyt_alpha_1.0._note: Best overall val loss in overfitting regime.

dyt_alpha_2.0._note: Our GPT default. Faster convergence, slightly worse final val.

dyt_alpha_3.0._note: Too aggressive. Train loss drops fast but val loss diverges.
